markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 7. FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITY LAWS [16000 - 16560]
### Chapter 3. Proof of Financial Responsibility [16430 - 16484]
#### Article 3. Release of Proof [16480 - 16484]
##### § 16483

The department shall cancel any bond or any certificate of insurance or direct the return of any money or securities to the person entitled thereto, upon the substitution and acceptance of other adequate proof of financial responsibility pursuant to this code.

*(Amended by Stats. 1989, Ch. 1157, Sec. 21.)*

subsections.text: The department shall cancel any bond or any certificate of insurance or direct the return of any money or securities to the person entitled thereto, upon the substitution and acceptance of other adequate proof of financial responsibility pursuant to this code.
